title: Pouch Of Fortune
description: Adds a pouch in the game that can copy any item!
body:
Are you tired of gathering thousands of resources? Would you rather just build but dont like creative mode? Then this mod is for you!

 

This mod adds a pouch into the game that can make the item in your offhand to 64.

 ![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FVSkEEyi/images/dcc7b6b0992f582bc372053e7b528608275aa6cc.png)




 

Its decently easy to make compared to how OP it is. its for forge 1.20.1.

 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xBsTceKHiWY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


 

Texture is made with the free version of AI MC Texture (deep-pixels.com) so thanks to the developer of deep pixels!  
 

 

If you have any idea for more pouches to add to the game then comment them below!

 

DISCLAIMER:

There are still bugs like being able to make a stack of tools or a stack of enderpearls etc.
